name: S&P Global Inc.
summary: S&P Global Inc. is a global provider of benchmarks, data, analytics, and workflow solutions serving capital, energy and commodity, and automotive markets. Its five segments—Market Intelligence, Ratings, Energy, Mobility, and Indices—deliver products including credit ratings, price assessments, index benchmarks, automotive data, and financial analytics. Customers include asset managers, investment banks, OEMs, insurers, governments, and commodity traders worldwide.

products.name: S&P Capital IQ Pro
products.description: Desktop product providing data, analytics, and third-party research for global finance and corporate professionals.

products.name: Wall Street Office
products.description: Financial technology solution for enterprise data management and workflow.

products.name: Enterprise Data Manager
products.description: Software solution helping customers manage and analyze financial data.

products.name: Information Mosaic
products.description: Enterprise software solution for financial operations and regulatory compliance.

products.name: iLevel
products.description: Software platform for private equity data management and analytics.

products.name: RatingsXpress
products.description: Subscription-based service delivering S&P credit ratings data.

products.name: RatingsDirect
products.description: Subscription platform providing access to S&P credit ratings and research.

products.name: Credit Analytics
products.description: Advanced analytics and financial risk solutions for credit assessment.

products.name: S&P Dow Jones Indices
products.description: Index benchmarks for ETFs, mutual funds, derivatives, and portfolio analytics used by institutional investors.

products.name: Platts Price Assessments
products.description: Benchmark price assessments and forward curves for energy and commodity markets.

products.name: Global Markets Group
products.description: Bookbuilding platforms across municipal bonds, equities, and fixed income.
